button.primary: bg-[#D8B45C] text-[#FFFFFF] hover:bg-[#F4DFA4] hover:text-[#2B2118] px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all shadow-gold_glow hover:shadow-gold_glow_hover
button.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#2B2118] border border-[#D8B45C] hover:bg-[#FFF8EF] px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium transition-all
button.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/40 text-[#2B2118] px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/90 transition-all

card.product: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-soft hover:shadow-gold_glow transition-all group overflow-hidden border border-transparent hover:border-[#D8B45C]/30 relative
card.service: bg-[#FDEDEA] rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-soft hover:shadow-gold_glow transition-all
card.glass_panel: bg-[#FFFFFF]/80 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl border border-[#FFFFFF] shadow-glass p-8

badges.ingredient: bg-[#7ED6D1]/10 text-[#7ED6D1] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-[#7ED6D1]/20
badges.premium: bg-[#D8B45C]/10 text-[#D8B45C] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs uppercase tracking-widest border border-[#D8B45C]/30
badges.offer: bg-[#F6B8A8]/20 text-[#C95C5C] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

sections_layout.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#FFF8EF]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#D8B45C]/10
sections_layout.hero: relative min-h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-[#FFF8EF] via-[#FDEDEA] to-[#FFF8EF] overflow-hidden

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Playfair Display for all main headings and Inter for body text.
Do NOT use gold text on light backgrounds for body copy. Rely on Deep Espresso (#2B2118) for main text and Muted Taupe (#8A7A6A) for secondary text.
Implement the 'gold_glow' shadow effect on hover states for premium cards and buttons.
Include premium subtle motion. Use the defined transition properties for card hover lifts (-translate-y-2).
Hero section should contain floating motion cards featuring the provided hero images (sunscreen, serum, ittar, facial, jewellery, handbag).
Maintain the K-Glow Gold visual palette strictly as defined.
Include a 'data-testid' attribute on all interactive and key elements.
